name: OTP Input
description: An accessible One-Time Password input component supporting keyboard navigation, digit constraints, and dynamic separation.

props.name: maxLength
props.description: Total number of OTP digit boxes to render.

props.name: separator
props.description: When true, renders a dash separator at the midpoint of the digit boxes.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all input boxes when true, preventing user interaction.

keyboardNavigation.description: Moves focus to the previous input box.
Moves focus to the next input box.
Deletes the current value and shifts focus back if empty.

ariaAttributes.description: Announces a collection of related inputs to screen readers.
Gives a descriptive name to the OTP input group.
Identifies the digit number for each single input.
